clear_subject: The scene must have a clear, prominent main subject that matches the pun
visual_contrast: Use visual contrast to highlight the pun meaning (e.g., dry vs wet, bright vs dark)
avoid_interference: Remove elements that might suggest other idioms or cause confusion
direct_action: Show clear actions that express the pun meaning visually
simple_scene: Keep the scene simple and focused, avoid unnecessary complexity
highlight_keyword: Visually emphasize the key character that forms the pun
literal_representation: Represent the pun characters literally in the scene when possible
no_text: HIGHEST PRIORITY: Absolutely NO text, letters, signs, words, or written characters in the scene - use ONLY visual elements and actions
